ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Southeast Asia, South Asia) */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country (e.g., Malaysia, India) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the country is located */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division (e.g., Abidjan, Rajasthan) */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the division is located */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area of the division */,
  "population_density" TEXT /* Population density of the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_divisions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "authors_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of authors */,
  "authors_name" TEXT /* Names of the authors (e.g., Diallo Et Al., Cecilia Et Al.) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the authors */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the authors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("authors_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strains" (
  "strain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strain */,
  "strain_name" TEXT /* Name of the strain (e.g., DENV1/MALAYSIA/P1244/1972) */,
  "accession" TEXT /* Accession number of the strain */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the strain was collected */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the strain was collected */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the strain was collected */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the division (e.g., state, province) where the strain was collected */,
  "authors_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the authors of the study */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the study was published */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the study */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the study */,
  "num_date" INTEGER /* Numerical date of the strain collection */,
  "raw_date" TEXT /* Raw date string of the strain collection */,
  "dtiter" REAL /* DTiter value of the strain */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the strain collection */,
  "dtiter_sanofi" REAL /* DTiter value for Sanofi */,
  "ctiter" REAL /* CTiter value of the strain */,
  "mutation_labels" TEXT /* Detailed mutation labels for the strain */,
  "isolation_source" TEXT /* Source of the strain isolation (e.g., human, mosquito) */,
  " Passage_history" TEXT /* Passage history of the strain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strains_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strains_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strains_authors_id FOREIGN KEY ("authors_id") REFERENCES authors ("authors_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strains_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mutations" (
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mutation */,
  "strain_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the strain where the mutation is found */,
  "mutation_labels" TEXT /* Detailed mutation labels for the strain */,
  "amino_acid_change" TEXT /* Change in amino acid sequence due to the mutation */,
  "mutation_type" TEXT /* Type of the mutation (e.g., synonymous, non-synonymous) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mutation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutations_strain_id FOREIGN KEY ("strain_id") REFERENCES strains ("strain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phylogenetic_trees" (
  "tree_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phylogenetic tree */,
  "strain_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the strain used to build the tree */,
  "tree" TEXT /* Phylogenetic tree in Newick or Nexus format */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to build the tree (e.g., NJ, ML, Bayesian) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used to build the tree */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tree_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "strain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strain being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the strain */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the strain was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_params" TEXT /* Query parameters used to filter the strains */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_strain_id FOREIGN KEY ("strain_id") REFERENCES strains ("strain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strain_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the strain */,
  "strain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strain */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the strain */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Detailed list of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strain_versions_strain_id FOREIGN KEY ("strain_id") REFERENCES strains ("strain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomic_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genomic feature */,
  "strain_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the strain where the feature is found */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of the genomic feature (e.g., gene, repeat, SNP) */,
  "start" INTEGER /* Start position of the feature */,
  "end" INTEGER /* End position of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_features_strain_id FOREIGN KEY ("strain_id") REFERENCES strains ("strain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "epidemiological_data" (
  "epidemiological_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each epidemiological data entry */,
  "strain_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the strain associated with the epidemiological data */,
  "disease_outbreak" TEXT /* Type of disease outbreak (e.g., dengue fever, dengue hemorrhagic fever) */,
  "num_cases" INTEGER /* Number of cases reported */,
  "num_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths reported */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the outbreak */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("epidemiological_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_epidemiological_data_strain_id FOREIGN KEY ("strain_id") REFERENCES strains ("strain_id")
)
